response.overview: one hundred doors closing is a durational aural/video artwork contemplating the limits of potentiality, and the acknowledgement of both physical and mental decline associated with aging. Through repetition of form, doors builds out a network of isolated and immersive audiophonic recordings that are at the same time both strange and familiar, offering a collection of sonic snap-shots reflecting on the everyday sublime. Intentional listening with quality headphones is encouraged.
response.title: one hundred doors closing
